title: ConstraintProfile
description: Schema for ConstraintProfile entities representing constraints that govern how construction patterns may be applied, including manufacturer limitations, building code requirements, dimensional rules, and environmental factors.

id.description: Unique identifier for the constraint profile, following the TEXTURE or CLIMATE CONSTR-CNS naming convention.

name.description: Human-readable name of the constraint profile.

description.description: Detailed description of the constraint, including its origin, rationale, and impact on pattern selection or implementation.

schema_version.description: Version of this JSON schema definition used to validate the entity.

pattern_language_version.description: Version of the Construction Pattern Language specification this entity conforms to.

entity_revision.description: Monotonically increasing revision number for this entity, incremented on each update.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when this entity was originally created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when this entity was last modified.

constraint_type.description: The classification of this constraint: 'manufacturer' for product-specific limitations, 'code' for building code and regulatory requirements, 'dimensional' for size and tolerance rules, and 'environmental' for climate and site condition factors.

applies_to.description: List of pattern identifiers that this constraint profile governs.

items.description: Reference to a Pattern entity ID.

parameters.description: Optional key-value pairs defining specific constraint parameters (e.g., max_span, min_cover, fire_rating).

thresholds.description: Optional threshold values that define pass/fail criteria for this constraint.

min.description: Minimum acceptable value for the constrained measurement.

max.description: Maximum acceptable value for the constrained measurement.

unit.description: Unit of measurement for the threshold values (e.g., psi, mm, degrees_F).

warning_threshold.description: Optional value at which a warning should be raised before the hard limit is reached.

notes.description: Free-form notes, code references, or additional context about this constraint profile.
